title: Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (comic series)
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:Rotj_SE.jpg]] |title=''Classic Star Wars:
Return of the Jedi'' |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=*[[Al Williamson]] *[[Carlos Garzón]] |inker= |letterer=[[Ed King]] |colorist=*[[Cary Porter]] *[[Perry McNamee]] |cover artist=[[Tim Hildebrandt|Tim]] and [[Greg Hildebrandt]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[October]] [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-646/Classic-Star-Wars-Return-of-the-Jedi-1|text=Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi #1}} |end date=[[November]] [[1994]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/93-821/Classic-Star-Wars-Return-of-the-Jedi-2|text=Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi #2}} |schedule=Monthly |format=Completed |issues=2 |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi''''' is a comic series that is part of the [[Classic Star Wars]] series of comics and re-publishes the original [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. ==Media== ===Issues=== *[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 1|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' 1]] *[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi 2|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' 2]] ===Collected in=== *[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' trade paperback]] *[[Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi - The Special Edition]]'' *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 6]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Rebellion Omnibus Vol. 3]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Classic Star Wars: El Retorno del Jedi |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ჯედაის დაბრუნება (კომიქსების სერია) }} [[Category:Comic film adaptations|6]] [[Category:Dark Horse Comics comic miniseries]] [[Category:Legends comic miniseries]]
